title: Freelance Software Engineer
bullets: Contributing to a multi-tenant AI sales-outreach platform, shipping backend, AI, and frontend features end-to-end.

Handling deployments and stabilizing the production pipeline: scoring, enrichment, and webhook fixes.

title: End-of-Studies Intern

title: Data Platform Development Intern
